case_title: ROBERT GORDON et al VS. MERCEDES CERNA et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAY-30-2003 CONTINUED TO JUL-25-2003 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212, TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT (S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
